entry.title: From Blue Links to Direct Answers: My Personal Journey Through the AI Search Revolution
entry.content:
Search has always been a cornerstone of my studies and professional journey. It was instrumental in both my personal and career growth. I still remember the awe I felt seeing those blue links and clicking through them to find the answers I needed. The thrill of discovery, of piecing together information from various sources, shaped much of how I learned and worked. Now, the landscape has changed—those blue links are being replaced with direct answers, removing the need for all those clicks. And it’s this same sense of awe that I feel today, as we witness the emergence of a new AI-driven search market that is transforming how we interact with information.

The artificial intelligence (AI) search market is undergoing a wave of transformation, as new players take bold strides to challenge established giants like Google and Microsoft. This dynamic shift is driven by rapid advancements in AI technologies and an increasing demand for more personalized and intuitive search experiences. Apart from Google AI Overviews, these are some other notable AI Search Engines which were in news in the last couple of weeks.

Perplexity AI: A Rising Star in AI Search

One of these emerging players is Perplexity AI, an ambitious AI-powered search startup that is making significant inroads into the search landscape. Recently, the startup reported processing over 100 million search queries per week—a clear sign of growing user interest in AI-driven search solutions (TechCrunch). Unlike traditional search engines that present an array of links, Perplexity uses large language models to offer direct, concise answers in a conversational style. This approach eliminates the need for users to sift through pages of search results, providing an efficient, user-centric experience that positions Perplexity as a formidable contender in the AI search space.

Meta's Leap into AI Search

Meta Platforms Inc., too, is preparing to join the AI search revolution. The social media giant is currently developing its own AI-powered search engine, aiming to reduce its dependence on external providers like Google and Bing. Meta's search engine is designed to enhance the functionality of its AI chatbot, providing real-time responses across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. This move reflects Meta's ambitions to create a fully integrated search capability that serves users within its ecosystem, delivering instant answers about trending topics and events.

OpenAI's SearchGPT: Expanding Capabilities

OpenAI, a key player in the AI domain, has introduced SearchGPT—an AI-driven search engine that combines real-time data retrieval with conversational AI capabilities. SearchGPT marks an important enhancement to ChatGPT's utility, enabling users to receive up-to-date, conversational responses. This innovation positions OpenAI to compete more directly in the search market, offering an alternative that seamlessly integrates AI-driven dialogue with traditional search functions.

Changing Market Dynamics: Google's Dominance Challenged

Google has long been the dominant force in the search market, processing roughly 8.5 billion searches every day (SEMRush). Despite this overwhelming volume, the emergence of AI-driven alternatives like Perplexity AI, Meta's forthcoming search tool, and OpenAI's SearchGPT signals a shift towards more conversational and tailored search experiences. As users become more comfortable with these alternatives, we could see a redistribution of market share, particularly as these newer platforms continue to innovate.

Recent statistics underscore this shifting dynamic. As of October 2024, Google's global search engine market share stands at 89.33%, a slight decrease compared to previous years, reflecting growing competition (SEMRush). Microsoft’s Bing holds 4.15% of the market, while Yandex and Yahoo! account for 2.8% and 1.33%, respectively. In the United States, Google's market share was 86.94% in March 2024, with Bing rising to 8.04%, marking its highest recorded share in the U.S. to date (Statista). The rapid growth of AI-driven platforms, alongside increasing user comfort with these newer tools, indicates a potential shift in market dynamics as more personalized and conversational options become available.

Furthermore, the global AI market is projected to exceed $1 trillion by 2028, growing at an annual rate of 40% from 2023 to 2028 (SEMRush). This explosive growth is indicative of the increasing integration of AI technologies across various sectors, including search engines, and highlights the transformative potential of AI-driven solutions in reshaping user experiences.

Navigating Legal and Ethical Challenges

The rise of AI-powered search engines also introduces a complex set of legal and ethical issues. A key concern centers around the use of content from third-party publishers. Perplexity AI, for example, is facing legal action from major publishers such as The New York Times and News Corp, who have alleged unauthorized use of their content. These lawsuits underline the ongoing tension between the desire for innovation in AI and the need to protect intellectual property rights. Ensuring a balance between innovation and ethical practices is becoming increasingly crucial as these technologies evolve.

Below is a list summarizing notable lawsuits involving AI search platforms:

 

  1. October 2024: Dow Jones & New York Post vs. Perplexity AI - Allegation: Unauthorized use of copyrighted journalism content. Source: Wall Street Journal
  2. October 2024: The New York Times vs. Perplexity AI - Allegation: Unauthorized scraping and use of content. Source: The Verge
  3. December 2023: The New York Times vs. OpenAI & Microsoft - Allegation: Unlawful use of millions of articles to train AI models. Source: Bloomberg Law
  4. June 2023: Authors Guild vs. OpenAI - Allegation: Copyright infringement for using fiction works to train language models. Source: TechPolicy.Press
  5. June 2023: Paul Tremblay & Mona Awad vs. OpenAI - Allegation: Copyright infringement for using nonfiction works to train language models. Source: TechPolicy.Press

 

These cases highlight the ongoing tension between AI innovation and the protection of intellectual property rights. As AI search technologies continue to evolve, addressing these legal and ethical challenges remains crucial to ensure a balanced and fair digital ecosystem.

Disclaimer: This blog was written with assistance from ChatGPT, and the image used was generated using DALL-E.

Conclusion: A New Era in AI Search

The AI search market is evolving at breakneck speed, with new players introducing fresh approaches that challenge traditional search paradigms. These innovations promise to deliver enhanced user experiences—more conversational, more direct, and more efficient. However, they also bring legal and ethical considerations to the forefront, reminding us of the importance of establishing fair practices that foster a balanced digital ecosystem. As the market continues to evolve, it will be fascinating to watch how these shifts impact the future of search, and whether these rising players can truly disrupt Google's long-held dominance.

References:

  1. TechCrunch: Perplexity AI Hits 100 Million Queries

  2. SEMRush: Google Search Statistics 2024

  3. SEMRush: Search Engine Market Share 2024

  4. Statista: Leading Search Engines USA

  5. SEMRush: Global AI Market Growth 2028

  6. Wall Street Journal: Dow Jones & New York Post vs. Perplexity AI

  7. The Verge: The New York Times vs. Perplexity AI

  8. Bloomberg Law: The New York Times vs. OpenAI & Microsoft

  9. TechPolicy.Press: AI Lawsuits Overview

entry.title: Payslip not Updated on Users End (Successfactors People Profile)
entry.content:
Hi Team! has any experience that in a particular employee, the payslip on their end is not updated (Aug 2024 statement) but on our end, it is updated when we are checking his profile (October 2024). 

Is there any particular solution for this? Like a sync job or anything? 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Enhancement while listing in Retail
entry.content:
Hi Yilmaz,

As you know, the logic of listing is to copy the value entered in the Reference store or reference distribution center to the store or distribution center.

If you want to enter a different value instead of production, you can write code in the IF_EX_BADI_ARTICLE_REF_RT~REFERENZ method like this, we enter the value for the PRCTR field in this way.

 

Thanks

Konul Khalilova

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new Adaptation Editor experience for SAPUI5 adaptation projects
entry.content: Hi @JensStaedter, sorry to hear about your troubles. This needs to be investigated by the UI5 team. Could you please create an incident on CA-UI5-FL-ADP-BAS? Thank you.

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initiative: M Atiq Ur Rehman, SAP S/4HANA Production Planning(PP)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am M Atiq Ur Rehman and i have done my Mechanical Engineering degree at UOS in 2017, and I spent several years working in the automobile industry. My last role was as Deputy Manager of PP & IE, where I gained valuable experience in production planning and industrial engineering.

However, over the past few months, I've developed a strong interest in SAP, particularly in the SAP PP (Production Planning) module. A close friend of mine, who is already working in SAP, has been a great motivator for me to explore this field. He has highlighted the significant growth opportunities and career potential in SAP, which led me to seriously consider transitioning into this space.

I am eager to pursue a career as an SAP PP as a consultant and am currently working toward obtaining certification in SAP PP to further equip myself with the skills needed for this role. I believe this new path will provide me with more opportunities for professional development and allow me to leverage my experience in production planning while gaining expertise in a highly sought-after technology.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
M Atiq Ur Rehman

@David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: Error Encountered During Status change for Standard Change
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Please tell me how to delete the Business Partner in App - Manage Business Partner
entry.content:
We would like to delete the Business Partner in App - Manage Business Partner on MTE, but I couldn't find delete button.
Could you tell us how to delete it? Or if can't delete, please tell us alternatives.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Please tell me how to delete the Business Partner in...
entry.content:
You have a few options here to block&archive&delete the BPs:

Option 1. You can finish the ongoing business with the BP by closing/archiving all of the documents which it is used in and you will then be able to block (it can be unblocked) and then if you also like, after the BP is blocked you can archive & delete the BP fully. Please refer to this KBA:2742388 - S4HC: How to delete Business Partner, Customer or Supplier Master Data in S/4HANA Cloud (deletion cannot be undone) <<< this is the best and recommended option

Option 2. If you are not yet ready to block the BP fully as recommended in option 1 then you can set blocks on the BP at the different levels e.g. you can block the BP from being used in Sales and or Purchasing documents and the BP will not be allowed to be used in these documents.

Option 3. Use Authorization Groups. Authorization groups can also be used to restrict which you can edit specific BPs. Its vales can be found and set at BP Level, Customer level, Supplier Level, Company Code, Sales and Purchasing levels. It can be used in combination with the Business Roles (Authorization ) which are assigned to a user to restrict which Authorization groups they have access to. So if you set an Authorization group on the BP you can control which users can access and edit the BP. You can try this and check if this can prevent the BP from being seen in documents as we(LO-MD-BP component) are not familiar with the logic for each document type area like SD, FIN or MM. You could use the Authorization groups along with the blocking options mentioned in option 2 to provide extra “hiding” of the BP as the Authorization group can be used to prevent unauthorised users from editing these BPs. For information on Customer / Supplier Business Partner Master Data: Authorization Groups our customer can refer to this blog: Customer / Supplier Business Partner Master Data: Authorization Groups

In Summary, you have a couple of options if you are not yet ready to finish the business (close the existing documents) with the BP, however, the best option we suggested would be to finish the business with the BP and follow the blocking process outlined in scope item   https://rapid.sap.com/bp/#/browse/scopeitems/5LE 

Let me know you have any further queries , happy to assist you.

Please do not hesitate to let me know if you have any further queries on this case.

Best regards,

Bo

entry.title: Re: Weight not populated in storage bin if material is ma...
entry.content:
Hi 

As per your screen shot Maximum weight is highlighted. It works for capacity check also.

It works as We need to activated capacity check at storage type level

then we need to maintain weight in Storage Bin

Maintain weight in Material 

That's why I give you that url 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: How to check list of satellite systems in Solution manager ( we recently decomm pre prod system)
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Automation Of IDoc Metadata Deletion / Refresh In NWA
entry.content:
I am knowing very well this problem. But maybe to understand the concept of SAP with IDOC and Extension Types:

Once you have released a type, you normally never unrelease it - if you are doing an innovation, you supposed to inherit to a new version where you add additional fields. (that's why we have ORDERS01, ORDERS02, ..ORDERS05 ...) 

However, everybody knows the disadvantage - if you create a new type, you have to adjust the Operational mapping - usually you also have to adjust the MM or XSLT mapping accordingly and the ICO. This is causing much more regression testing than probably adding one missing field to an existing type. 

But IMO this is the only reason why you should unload/delete the Meta data - as only if you are adjusting the schema it will cause issues (new field disappears when IDOC-XML is converted into IDOC native). 

Advised is to transport the change of the IDOC in ABAP backend before you are going live with your change. So you can remove after the import into production the meta data and let it reload then with next occurrence.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO (If Message enter in SAP PI system how mess...
entry.content:
Hi ,

When a message enters the SAP PI system, it follows a series of steps to ensure it reaches its target system successfully. Here's a brief outline of the process:

Message Arrival:Adapter Engine (AE):
The message enters the system through an adapter (e.g., File Adapter, JDBC Adapter, etc.) based on the sender system's configuration. The communication channel associated with the sender agreement picks up the message.

Message Conversion:
The message is in its native format when it enters SAP PI. The adapter processes the message and converts it into the SAP XI message format, using an internal module that performs the conversion. This conversion ensures the message can be understood by the Integration Engine.

Message ID Generation & CPA Lookup:
A unique Message ID is generated, and a Collaboration Partner Agreement (CPA) lookup is performed to fetch the relevant configuration details from the Integration Builder. This ensures the sender's system, message interface, and other metadata are correctly identified.

Message Processing:
The message then passes through various modules for further processing, such as structure conversion, protocol handling, and any necessary transformations. These modules ensure that the message conforms to the target system's format.

Queueing & Delivery:
After processing, the message is placed in the Send Queue, which is monitored by the Integration Server (IS). The message is then picked up by the XI Adapter, and its status is updated to DLNG (Delivery Pending). It is then sent to the target system’s endpoint.

Audit Log & Monitoring:
Every stage of the message lifecycle is logged in the Audit Log. You can view the audit log in the Runtime Workbench (RWB) to track the status and any issues in the message processing flow.

Successful Delivery:
Once the message has been successfully processed and delivered to the target system (e.g., DB, HTTP endpoint, etc.), the message status is updated to DLVD (Delivered).

Error Handling (if any):
In case of any issues, such as an error in message processing, an alert is triggered, and the message is placed in the error queue for troubleshooting and reprocessing.

Note : 

 

  • Adapter Engine (AE):

    • Handles message reception from the sender system via adapters.
    • Converts messages into SAP XI format.
    • Executes transformation and routing using the module processor.
    • Places the message in the Send Queue for further processing by the Integration Engine.

  • Integration Engine (IE):

    • Responsible for routing messages to the appropriate receiver system.
    • Performs Receiver Determination, Interface Mapping, and Message Mapping.
    • Logs the status and ensures successful delivery to the target system.
    • Provides detailed logs in the Audit Log to track message flow.

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Calendar integration into Microsoft Office 365 (incl. Microsoft Teams)
entry.content:
Hi @aschwericke,

for the URI you use the URI you use to access SAC in the browser and generally you should not need to do more configurations in your Azure.

I am very excited to learn and grow with the SAP Community.

Thanks & Regards
Mehar Ali.

entry.title: Re: Error in uploaded excel file into internal table through FM 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
entry.content:
Hi @rr_dev / @raymond_giuseppi ,

I used this code and my problem was resolved:

CLEAR: excel_s,vend_data_s.

  LOOP AT excel_t INTO excel_s .

    CASE excel_s-col.
      WHEN 1.
        vend_data_s-lifnr = excel_s-value.
      WHEN 2.
        vend_data_s-ltsnr = excel_s-value.
      WHEN 3.
        vend_data_s-zind = excel_s-value.
      WHEN 4.
        SPLIT excel_s-value AT '.' INTO DATA(day) DATA(month) DATA(year).
        vend_data_s-zvalfrom = year && month && day.
      WHEN 5.
        vend_data_s-deletion_ind = excel_s-value.

    ENDCASE.
    AT END OF row.
      APPEND vend_data_s TO vend_data_t.
      CLEAR: vend_data_s.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.

Thank you for your solutions.

entry.title: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:
Regarding the 'Invoice Receipt' field in the Process Control section of the item fields in the Purchase Order, it is currently set to be automatically selected by default.

Could you please let me know if it's possible to configure this field to be unselected by default? Thank you.

entry.title: How to delete the duplicated or old EWA session from Solution Manager
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I generated several duplicated EWA reports for one system. How to delete them and keep only one? 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete the duplicated or old EWA session from...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To resolve the issue, you can follow the steps below:

1. Use the report RDSMOPREDUCEDATA.
2. Delete the duplicated sessions by providing the SID, session number.

For more detailed information, you can refer to KBA 2427041 - How to delete old EWA sessions according to retention times automatically through a job.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Can´t confirm a warehouse task via RF - Warehouse ord...
entry.content:
Dear @VictorVillarpando,

could you please check the documentation for Warehouse Order Selection from the SAP Help Portal?

Warehouse Order Selection | SAP Help Portal

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: SAP is a Visionary in 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise Low-Code Application Platforms
entry.content:
Today, I am very proud to share the great news: Gartner has recognized SAP as a Visionary in its 2024 Magic Quadrant for Enterprise Low-Code Application Platforms (LCAP).

Let me share with you how we got here, what we believe makes us a Visionary in low-code application development with SAP Build and how you can get started with SAP’s one-stop-shop for extensibility and automations.

SAP Build – the low-code platform for SAP customers

We have designed SAP Build as the best software suite for SAP customers that want to efficiently extend their SAP solutions: SAP Build fosters fusion development allowing active collaboration between business users and professional developers, it brings Business AI with Joule copilot to boost development productivity, prebuilt LoB solutions with context-based recommendations, and deep integration with business applications.

A bit of history

Two years ago, at SAP TechEd 2022, we announced the launch of a powerful new offering to drive the next wave of business transformation by unleashing the expertise of those who know best in the lines of business.
SAP Build has been designed to put SAP’s world-class enterprise technology in the hands of multidisciplinary teams in business and IT, giving them direct, secure access to the end-to-end processes, data and context they need to make smarter decisions and drive innovation quickly. SAP Build allows business experts and, in the SAP world “Key Users”, to fruitfully collaborate with IT and developers to iterate and co-create new innovations.

Last year, at SAP TechEd 2023, we announced SAP Build Code, which went generally available in March this year. Tailored for SAP development, SAP Build Code is a comprehensive, turn-key solution for coding, testing, integrations, and application lifecycle management. Developers can leverage Joule to efficiently generate application logic, data models, and test scripts. SAP Build Code enhances the entire development process, from design time to runtime, significantly boosting developers’ productivity.

And recently at SAP TechEd 2024 we achieved another milestone by adding ABAP Environments to SAP Build: with this, SAP Build is THE extensibility solution for any SAP customer: you can now accelerate your ERP extension development and modernization, foster innovation, and automate processes, all in a single, comprehensive suite of AI-driven tools for extension development.

SAP Build is now the fastest growing area in SAP Business Technology Platform: we have doubled our revenue over the last year, increasing by more than 70% the active customer base. And we have had more than 200,000 active learners.

What makes SAP a visionary with SAP Build?

From my personal point of view, here are the key factors that make SAP Build the best development platform for SAP customers:

Fusion Team Development with one SAP Build offering

SAP is promoting the concept of fusion team development. Instead of converting pro-developers s to low-code developers (or vice versa), it combines its traditional developer stack with low-code SAP Build products. This multipronged development strategy resonates with enterprise developers and IT leaders who want the flexibility to use a range of approaches to build custom applications.

Fusion development is an enabler to be quicker with extending applications to your needs. What’s more, it is the foundation of allowing multidisciplinary teams to create connected solutions that fit the business’ needs, adds more people to the development and innovation equation which allows a much faster time to market, more fine-grained solutions shaped to the experts’ needs, and brings diversity into the innovation process.

Among our key innovations in Fusion Development:

  • Easy Project Discovery: Find, share and reuse application components with a centralized project lobby
  • Seamless Teamwork: Multiple developers can work simultaneously with version control and synchronized changes
  • Low-Code with Pro-Code Power: Business users can easily integrate pre-built solutions created by developers
  • Intuitive Iteration: Modify application, process & workspace designs and logic with drag-and drop ease, fostering collaboration between business and IT

Integrated Business AI capabilities

Assistance is what we expect from AI, to automate tedious tasks or to become faster with our assignments. Leveraging AI to speed up development productivity includes content recommendation sensitive to a certain context you find yourself in, allows you to naturally describe a process you’d like to create or even a data model to be created so you can focus on the creative parts of the app dev cycle, for instance, the UI creation. For that, SAP has integrated in SAP Build advanced AI capabilities that are grounded in business data: SAP Business AI understands business lingo and context. In addition, we recently launched at SAP TechEd the Joule Studio in SAP Build that will help customers and partners to build extensibility scenarios for Joule with custom skills and AI agents. So, Generative AI and Joule copilot are infused everywhere in SAP Build:

  • Application Development: Creation of business applications and automations
  • Process Automation: Process generation, process monitoring, document extraction and pre-built solution recommendations
  • Integration: Integration flow generation, pre-built integration recommendations
  • Joule Studio in SAP Build: Creating custom AI agents and skills for Joule copilot

Prebuilt LoB solutions

Content that allows developers to start with a ready-made template for their development is key for speeding up the creation process. Therefore, we are and have been investing heavily into content creation, be it ready-made APIs, process content packages, or application templates. Anything that is needed from a developer’s perspective to ease their work and make them faster in their creation process is available at hand in SAP Build available through the SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

Both SAP and partners contribute, maintain and update pre-built content. We have now more than 500 content packages with 120+ in Finance, 115+ in Supply Chain, 40+ in Human Resources and our recent innovations in this area include, but are not limited to:

  • Finance: Capital expenditure application, automation of accrual posting and more
  • Supply Chain: Process approval for SAP IBP, Purchase requisition approval for Ariba and more
  • Human Resources: Translate job postings, position management action and more

Deep integration with business apps

SAP is unifying and standardizing its application runtimes and developer tools for numerous developer personas and use cases. This new product composition makes it easier for customers to consume SAP Build and establish partnership links. It also provides the SAP Store and SAP Business Accelerator Hub offering prebuilt reusable components that accelerate application delivery.

Recently, we have delivered:

  • Navigation from the business application UI with contextualized Extensibility Wizard to initiate an SAP Build project: available already in in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, and soon in other SAP applications, the Extensibility Wizard is an embedded experience allowing key users to extend business applications – both on stack and side by side on SAP BTP – directly out of their business application without losing context.

For more details on how to set up the Extensibility Wizard and what extensions options are available, please read this blog post: “SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” and watch this Devtoberfest session by @Sesh_Sreenivas and @Karthik-Thiru.

  • Extensive library of connectors, integration flows and business events for SAP and non-SAP applications in SAP Business Accelerator Hub:

Learn more and get started with SAP Build!

To learn how SAP Build can optimize your finance, procurement, human resources, and more take the next step with the following resources:

  • Visit the SAP Build product page
  • If you are using S/4HANA, visit also our SAP Build for SAP S/4HANA page
  • Discover pre-built content packages on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • Explore the basic trial and start your learning journey
  • Activate your entitlements if you’re an existing RISE and GROW with SAP customer

Use SAP Build now, not only to easily create applications, but also to automate processes and to design digital workspaces with low code and generative AI!

 

 

GARTNER is a registered trademark and service mark of Gartner and Magic Quadrant is a registered trademark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the U.S. and internationally and are used herein with permission. All rights reserved.

This graphic was published by Gartner, Inc. as part of a larger research document and should be evaluated in the context of the entire document. The Gartner document is available upon request from SAP.

Gartner does not endorse any vendor, product or service depicted in its research publications, and does not advise technology users to select only those vendors with the highest ratings or other designation. Gartner research publications consist of the opinions of Gartner’s research organization and should not be construed as statements of fact. Gartner disclaims all warranties, expressed or implied, with respect to this research, including any warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

entry.title: MB52
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

After updating stock prices in MB52 the difference amount should be automatically updated in price difference GL however it is not showing.

The GL should ahow the amount of Rs 153360 however it is not showing.

 

please advise.

entry.title: Re: Upload Excel using SAP RAP Only
entry.content: @dinesh_kumar45 cl_abap_conv_in_ce is obsolete since 7.02. Here, the OP is assuming that the received CSV file is encoded in UTF-8, and the class is used to decode it into a STRING variable. Since 7.53, use CL_ABAP_CONV_CODEPAGE. Search the Community for more information.

BR

Timo

entry.title: Re: Usage of document type 39 to inform group shares in G...
entry.content: You mention that the task "preparation consolidation group changes" reverses the investment book value and percentage. I assume that the entire B/S data of your parent unit holding the investment is reversed by the task. You should find out the root cause for this by checking the group structure manager. I suspect that the parent unit is not part of the consolidation group in the version/period you execute the task. Hope this helps.

cu soon!
your Orga team Heinrich, Mathias & Christian from SEKU GmbH & scc AG

entry.title: Cannot create WT with Sample Split /SCWM/QINSP253
entry.content:
Hi,

we are working in an ERP BS7 connected to a decentral EWM on S/4 HANA.

We are currently upgrading the EWM to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01.

Since the upgrade, the QM Sample Process does not work anymore, as we are unable to create putaway warehouse tasks with the following message: /SCWM/QINSP253 "Can't create warehouse tasks until external sample is calculated".

The process did work in the old release without any issues ( on S4HANA 2021 02 (05/2022) FPS)

The strange part: 

In my POV, the Inspection document is updated with the correct External Sample size quantity. The status is fine as well. 

I am unsure, why we are unable to create an inbound warehouse task.

Am I missing something here? 

Config:

EWM

Thank yo

BR

Timo

entry.title: preventive maintenance plan hierarchical strategies
entry.content:
Hello,

Does the preventive maintenance plan strategy hierarchy works same way in both scenarios:

Scenario 1: Strategy plan has only one item and in task list there is used multiple maintenance packages (example: small inspection every 1YEAR  and big inspection every 5 YEAR)

Scenario 2: Strategy plan has two maintenance items

                                    ITEM 1: small inspection  every 1 YEAR (own task list with 1 year maintenance packet)

                                    ITEM 2: big inspection every 5 YEAR (own task list with 5 year maintenance packet)

Question: Does the higher hierarchy prevent maintenance plan creation (for 1 year) in scenario 2

entry.title: Re: Document Date (TaxDate) Should not update by user in...
entry.content:
Hi,

Up until SBO FP 2405, I hadn’t encountered an SAP setting that could accomplish this directly.

This functionality can only be implemented through either a Transaction Notification or an SDK Add-on.

With a Transaction Notification, the process is straightforward: you simply compare the current value in the database column with the corresponding value in the history table, and if they differ, you prevent the update.

In the case of an SDK Add-on, it's not possible to disable system controls in update mode.

Therefore, you also need to block the click, keypress, and menu (Ctrl+V) events to ensure the functionality works as expected.

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:
HI @Jack-pyo 

Could you help me find where to configure the PO item category in the backend? Do you have the configuration path?

Also, is it possible to maintain other fields or information that could automatically unselected the Invoice Receipt? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Project Outcomes with SAP: Best Practices from a Project Manager's Perspective
entry.content:
@Keron .In my experience leading cross-functional SAP projects, team dynamics can present unique challenges, especially when balancing diverse skill sets and experience levels. One common issue I’ve encountered is differing expectations on timelines. While the IT side might push for quick deployment, other departments, like finance or operations, may need more time to adjust, often because they have additional compliance or data requirements to consider.

Resistance can also arise from those accustomed to legacy systems, as you mentioned. Here, fostering open communication is key. We found regular workshops and aligning on a shared vision help build buy-in, allowing the team to gradually embrace new processes. Additionally, when budget constraints come up, it’s essential to prioritize features that bring immediate value, which keeps the team focused and motivated.

entry.title: Re: Creating localized attribute by a custom type
entry.content:
What you've created is not a "localized" type. Localized types are maptypes which use Language as key (argument) type. Just adding "localized:" prefix to a maptype does not make it a localized type. A type can be a localized type even if it does not have "localized:" prefix. See for the following maptypes defined in solrfacetsearch-items.xml

SolrSynonymLangMapping
SolrKeywordRedirectLangMapping
SolrStopWordLangMapping

See following references for more information about localized attributes

  • Localized Attributes (Internationalization and Localization) 
  • Localized Attributes (Languages and Localization) 

You can see Language type control of key type of the map in various code under platform. One example is checkLocalizedChange of AttributeDescriptor in package de.hybris.platform.jalo.type

protected void checkLocalizedChange(boolean newLoc) throws JaloInvalidParameterException {
	boolean typeProvidesLocalization = false;
	Type valueType = this.getRealAttributeType();
	if (valueType instanceof MapType) {
		Type argType = ((MapType)valueType).getArgumentType();
		if (argType instanceof ComposedType && Language.class.isAssignableFrom(((ComposedType)argType).getJaloClass())) {
			typeProvidesLocalization = true;
		}
	}

	if (newLoc && !typeProvidesLocalization) {
		throw new JaloInvalidParameterException("cannot set attribute " + this + " localized since value type doesnt allow", 0);
	}
}

Unfortunately, there seems to be a no way to define which attribute you will use to select the key or value in a map. Since most of the argument or return types are atomic types (e.g. String, Integer) they can be easily imported via ImpEx like the following

INSERT_UPDATE SolrIndexedProperty; name[unique = true];valueProviderParameters[map-delimiter = |] 
;indexedPropertyName;key1->value1|key2->value2|key3->value3|key4->value4

When an itemtype is used, you can use PK of the item when importing, but it cannot be done in single-run since PK value could not be available before the item is created. So I think your best choice is to use a Translator. You can find several Translators to investigate how you can write a new one. Also read more from here in Translator documentation

entry.title: SAP GTS - Import Declaration after goods receipt - no items available in worklist.
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

we are facing a Problem with respect to Import Declaration after goods receipt.

Our System:
- S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01
- GTS 11, SP 24

We intend to use the "Import declaration after goods receipt"-Scenario (Germany / European Union) following a completed Transit Process.

Inbound deliveries are created and transfered correctly to GTS (when T1 and MRN are inserted), and also the presentation is created correctly. But when we then do Goods Receipt posting via MIGO (referencing the inbound delivery), no Inbound activities are listed (more specifically, no data are entered in /SAPSLL/CUSWLO ==> we get a “no data found” information message). Apparently, the goods receipt is transferred successfully to GTS (e.g. for risk management). We noticed, that in /SAPSLL/CUSWLM field DLDNO is empty. If anybody could help us with some ideas that'd be great.

Thanks, Manuel

entry.title: Re: 400 Bad HTTP Request
entry.content: Standard HTTP status codes are between 100 and 599. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_HTTP_status_codes. I'm surprised that a non-standard code is rejected by the kernel. Use SICF menu > client > recorder to get the exact request and response. After that, you may also contact the SAP Support (I didn't find an SAP note about this message, but maybe https://me.sap.com/notes/2620715/E can give clues about the problem). NB: with the help of a developer, I would create my own web service on the same server, which returns 610, to test whether the kernel accepts a non-standard HTTP status code, that will prove that the problem is not directly due to 610.

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content: @yalcin_mete Look at the import queue history to see which transport requests were imported (STMS).

entry.title: Flexible Column Layout, havigate directly to Object Page in full screen mode
entry.content:
Hello.

I'm developing Fiori Elements application, that uses Flexible Column Layout. The app starts with list report and from it navigates to Object Page in TwoColumnsMidExpanded mode. So far so good.

But now I have also external navigation to my app, that opens directly Object Page for specified entity. And in that case, it always opens in TwoColumnsMidExpanded mode having empty (not loaded) list report on the left pane.

Is there any possibility to open Object Page in full screen mode (MidColumnFullScreen) when coming from external navigation? I tried defining different routes/targets, but nothing works. Actually, when I add any new route or target referring somehow to my Object Page, it breaks the main app processing.

I'm referring to similar old thread there:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/flexible-column-layout-hide-begin-column-list-report/qaq-p/700439

entry.title: Recheck Documented Credit Decision automatically?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a program we can run in the background that would "recheck" documented credit decision cases?

Let's say a sales order document is on credit block because the customer's credit limit is exceeded. After the customer made a payment, the blocked document should get rechecked because the credit exposure has been reduced enough to allow the sales order to get created, thus allowing the sales order to be released.

Would program RVKRED09 serve this function?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Recheck Documented Credit Decision automatically?
entry.content:
Hello,
 
Yes, there are background reports to trigger new credit check for existing sales documents when the credit situation changes (e.g. increasing credit limit, getting payment, etc.).
 
RVKRED06 - The report checks all blocked documents from a credit point of view. It should be started in the background after incoming payments
RVKRED08 - The report rechecks all sales documents which occur in the horizon of the dynamic credit check. The report should be started for each period at the start of the period.
RVKRED09 - The report RVKRED09 is designed for checking the credit documents from credit view in background. The report performs new credit checks, and gives you a range of selection options.
 
In general I would advise RVKRED09 as it gives most flexibility with the selection options.
 
Best regards,
Edina
SAP

entry.title: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content:
One of the benefits of using SAP BTP ABAP Environment is that updates and upgrades are applied by SAP to the systems in quite a high frequency and close to the corresponding release time.
Find the latest known schedule of Major Upgrade Windows and Weekly Maintenance Windows for 2025 in this blog post.

 

Major Upgrade Windows

As in 2024, the SAP BTP ABAP Environment will have 4 Major Upgrade Windows in 2025. These 24 hours of potential system unavailability are used to upgrade the systems to the next major version.
The events for the Major Upgrade Windows are harmonized between all SAP Cloud Products and scheduled for the following weekends:

  • February 15th – 16th (Release 2502) 
  • May 17th – 18th (Release 2505) 
  • August 16th – 17th (Release 2508) 
  • November 15th – 16th (Release 2511) 

Depending on the data center region, the 24 hours downtime will start/end at:

  • APJ: FRI 9 pm – SAT 9 pm UTC
  • Europe: SAT 4 am – SUN 4 am UTC
  • Americas: SAT 10 am – SUN 10 am UTC

The upgrade of the free tier systems takes place on the Thursday before the respective weekend.

 

Weekly Maintenance Windows

Potentially every weekend, the SAP BTP ABAP Environment could use a downtime of 4 hours, to apply database updates, Hotfix Collections and other changes.
Depending on the data center region, the 4 hours downtime may start at:

  • APJ: SAT 3 pm UTC
  • Europe: SAT 10 pm UTC
  • Americas: SUN 4 am UTC

The update of the free tier systems takes place on the Thursday before the respective weekend.
The following events for the release 2502 are planned as Weekly Maintenance Windows in 2025:

  • Hotfix Collection 4 for Release 2502 (only for systems which belong to the pre-upgrade)
    February 15th – 16th, 2025
  • Hotfix Collection 5 for Release 2502 | February 26th – 27th, 2025
  • Hotfix Collection 6 for Release 2502 | March 15th – 16th, 2025
  • Hotfix collection 7 for Release 2502 | March 29th - 30th, 2025

For more details about the Reduction of Planned Maintenance Windows for HFC Imports and Upgrades see our roadmap.


Client Safety of CDS and AMDP

To support client-safe implementation please read Client Handling in ABAP - SAP Community for an overview.
Technical background is provided in SAP Note 3472859 - AMDP: How to make AMDP methods client-safe.

Please adopt these recommendations. SAP will turn today's warning messages into error messages with the upgrade to release 2508, which is planned for August 2025.

 

Cloud System Notification Subscriptions (CSNS)

Please register to Cloud System Notification Subscriptions (CSNS) to get important information about planned and unplanned downtimes:

  • Access to Cloud System Notification Subscriptions (CSNS): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/getNotified
  • Find more information about Cloud System Notification Subscriptions (CSNS) in this documentation and video guide
  • To find the SAP BTP ABAP Environment entry select:
    Cloud Product: SAP Extension Suite - Development Efficiency
    Cloud Service: SAP BTP ABAP environment


References

  • Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows for SAP Cloud Services
  • SAP Note 2888562 – Intelligent Enterprise Suite: Harmonized release calendar for SAP Cloud products
  • Service Level Agreement for SAP Cloud Services

entry.title: we require non expiry sap user ID for the interface with other software's
entry.content:
Hi,


we are using the SAP user id to post the interface data in to the sap and we maintained the sap user id and password in the all interface API and CPI to post the data in sap s4 PERSON_NAME. but every 6 months sap user id password is expiring due to that interfaces are failing.


we required non expiry password for SAP user id to use in the interface.


 


Regards,


Manjunatha Reddy.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: we require non expiry sap user ID for the interface w...
entry.content:
Hello,
its easy to achieve that by selecting the correct user-Type for your requirement.

Please read the documentation in SU01 regarding the user-types on the Logon data tab. It says:

quote
User TypeDialog 'A'

A normal dialog user is used by one person only for all types of logon.

During a dialog logon, the system checks for expired and initial passwords and gives you the option to change your password.

Multiple dialog logons are checked and, where appropriate, logged.

System 'B'

Use the system user type for internal system processes (-> background processing) or system-related processes (-> ALE, workflow, TMS, CUA).

Dialog logon (using SAP GUI) is not possible.

A user of this type is excluded from the general settings for password validity. Only user administrators can change the password using transaction SU01 (Goto -> Change Password).

Multiple logons are allowed.

Communication 'C'

Use users of type Communication for dialog-free communication between systems (-> RFC or CPIC) .

Dialog logon (using SAP GUI) is not possible.

The general settings for the validity period of a password apply to users of this type. Users of this type can change their passwords (like dialog users). The dialogs for changing the password must be provided by the caller (RFC/CPIC client). You can use the RFC function module SUSR_USER_CHANGE_PASSWORD_RFC or the RFC API function RfcOpenEx() to change the password.

Service 'S'

A user of the type Service is a dialog user that is available to an anonymous, larger group of users. Generally, this type of user should only be assigned very restricted authorizations.

For example, service users are used for anonymous system access using an ITS service or a public Web service. Once an individual has been authenticated, a session that started anonymously using a service user can be continued as a personal session using a dialog user (see SUSR_INTERNET_USERSWITCH)

During logon, the system does not check for expired and initial passwords. Only the user administrator can change the password.

Multiple logons are allowed.

Reference 'L'

Like the service user, a reference user is a general user, not assigned to a particular person. You cannot log on using a reference user. The reference user is only used to assign additional authorizations. Reference users are implemented to equip Internet users with identical authorizations.

On the Roles tab, you can specify a reference user for additional rights for dialog users. In general, the application controls the assignment of reference users. The name of the reference user can be assigned using variables. The variables should begin with "$". You assign variables to reference users in transaction SU_REFUSERVARIABLE.

This assignment applies to all systems in a CUA landscape. If the assigned reference user does not exist in one of the CUA child systems, the assignment is ignored.

Overview

Overview of the properties of users of the different user types:

Property / User Type                       Dialog          Communication             System              Service

Dialog logon (SAP GUI)                   X                 -                                       -                  X

Password Change                           X                X                                        -                   -

Logon ticket can be generated          X                X                                         -                 -

 

Apart from reference users, users of all types can log on to a system using RFC or execute background jobs.

unquote

So for your requirement user type 'System' seems to be appropriate. Please discuss with your user administrator.

 

b.rgds,
Bernhard

entry.title: Exception Handling in Workflow for Sales Documents
entry.content:
During the creation of a workflow in the "Workflow for Sales Documents" app, in the exception handling part for the Rework Requested only "Restart Workflow" option is available as an Action Result. 

In SWDD_SCENARIO, for the sales order approval WS02000006 in the rework of sales order step all of the action results seems to be available, but we can't choose other options in the workflow app.

Does anyone know the solution for this issue, our customer want to use other options such as Continue in case of a Rework. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content: @yalcin_mete Transaction SE03 (transport tools) to find the transport requests which contain one given object. Also, in your development system, go to the object and display the versions of the object to see all its transport requests (unless you have emptied the version database at some point in time).

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please maintain Fields Relevant to Printouts of Change as shown in the SAP Blog:  https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-generate-purchase-order-output-on-change-of-a-purchase-order/ba-p/13689606.

When there is a change in the value of the field which are marked as print relevant, a new output should be issued. 

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: What's new in DTV 1.5
entry.content:
It’s a been a while since DTV 1.5 is released, and I am more than happy to share more information regarding the latest and greatest release of Data Transition Validation Tool.

Partial Execution

In DTV 1.5 partial execution of data simulation, extraction and evaluation is now enabled in work item level. In a real time, scenario, when we define multiple split parameters for greater granularity of data, execution of huge amount of data may lead to failures sometimes. With partial execution enablement, now users can execute simulation, extraction, and evaluation of individual failed work items instead of the whole test specification saving valuable time during business data evaluation in business down time.

Specify Maximum number of work processes

Whether it is Simulation, Extraction or Evaluation, DTV creates background jobs for processing and executing work items. For optimum system performance, now you can define dedicated number of work processes which can be utilized for DTV for background jobs, further finetuning the DTV overall performance.

You can do the setup in Maintain Systems -> Max. num of Processes.

Result Data

The entire result data of the reports including the hidden fields can now be seen in the Result Data making the analysis easy and intuitive for the end user.

Copy the project including the Test Specification

In DTV 1.5 you have the possibility to copy the project global data and the test specifications to further improve the usability of the tool.

 

Execution Runtime information is enhanced with delay time calculations

entry.title: From where in S4 can I find the SAC values for Rate types like average and closing (currency)?
entry.content:
I'm currently building a model in SAC where data is imported from S4. The dimensions used in the model are Profit Center, Cost Center, GL Account, and Company Code. 

As I need currency conversion in the model, I am wondering if I can obtain directly from the system the SAC type required for the currency conversion such as average or closing. 

For example I know that for GL Account, there is a specific property called SAC Account Type available in an API in S4 so that you can upload the data in SAC with the correct SAC type. Im wondering if there is something similar in terms of currency. 

Thanks,

Appreciate for your helping!

entry.title: SAP Build process automation - Document Template - Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We built a process using SAP Document Information Extraction Using Templates, and it worked fine.

Now we created new subaccount and we move our project there, but we are getting an error when we try to create/change/use a template.

The message is "SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be completed. Call to Document Information Extraction failed with status 400 BAD_REQUEST.

I checked and I have the role collection ProcessAutomationDeveloper that contains the role Document_Information_Extraction_UI_Templates_Admin.

What else can be missing?

Thanks

SAP Build Process Automation , Document Information Extraction

entry.title: Production and Maintenance Order Settlement
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about Production and Maintenance Order Settlement. When I settle Production order with consumes I see also quantities that are settled in accounting document, while in Maintenance order, always with consumes this does not happen.

Is there any setting that I'm missing? Or this is the standard SAP behaviour?

Thank you,

Pietro

entry.title: Re: Equipment Status to INAC
entry.content:
Hi Preethialevarthi,

Equipment-Asset synchronization (by standard) can be done only for a predefined set of fields. In the IMG route: Financial Accounting -> Asset Accounting -> Master Data -> Automatic creation of equipment master records -> Assign Master Data fields of Assets and Equipment, you can find the fields that can be mapped.

Before this you have to map asset class with equipment category and give conditions in "Specify conditions for synchronization of Master Date" node.

If you want to synchronize more fields, you have to go with "Develop Enhancement for Field and Class Assignment" IMG node (Customer Enhancement: AAPM0001). It is recommended to only create a synchronization between data fields for which the following is true:

    • The fields are defined syntactically the same. (Not same in the case of INAC eqp. status and deletion of asset)
    • The fields are not primary or foreign keys.

Refer note : 370884 - PM-AA 4.6C: Consulting on sync activation + corrections - SAP for Me

Alternatively:
You can use the BADI: EQUI_UPDATE or User Exit: IEQM0003 to detect equipment status change to INAC (Status type code = 'I0320').

For updating the asset master record, you can use the functional module ASSET_MASTERRECORD_MAINTENANCE. Field for deletion flag: I_ANLA - XSPEB

Hope this answer gave you a brief overview to help your case.

Regards,
Ritesh PR

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I'm a male and I have completed the module in Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise. I am passionate to become an SAP Certified Associate - End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise. I have a background in AI and I'm pleased to join SAP client's network as an expert in customer/technical support.

Your support is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: ME23N PO Print Preview not working sometimes
entry.content: have a look

entry.title: Re: change withholding tax base amount in S4HC
entry.content: I report the screen where I accessed the journal entry on the supplier's line item by accessing in edit mode. No withholding tax fields are editable. Thanks

entry.title: Re: change withholding tax base amount in S4HC
Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: Hi Sandra,

entry.title: Re: change withholding tax base amount in S4HC
entry.content:
Please try follwing below steps.

In order to change Withholding Tax Code please follow the steps below:

  1. APP :Schedule Accounts Payable Jobs
  2. Click on + sign and choose the Job Template Recreate and Change Withholding Tax Data with 0% Withholding Tax Rate (RFWT0020)
  3. Input the needed parameters and press Schedule
    There is a checkbox Start Immediately - if checked, the report will be executed immediately.
    Also there is the checkbox for Test mode - so you can check the potential changes, before running the report in real mode and make changes to database entries.

entry.title: Re: ****HOW TO SHOW MONTHLY DATA IN DIFFERENT ROW WISE -...
entry.content:
3 different tables

Table 1 filtered for Jan-Apr

Table 2 filtered for May-Aug

Table 3 filtered for Sep-Dec

Use relative positioning for the 3 tables to make it look like it is one big table

regards

James

entry.title: Re: Difference between "Stock Transp Order Del" and "Stoc...
entry.content: Hi Dominik, Hi Rashid
